name: setJitter
title: setJitter
description: The Jitter interval for the timers of a network node can be set with this function. The two values may lie between –10000 and 10000 (corresponds to –100.00% to 100.00%). If one of the two values does not lie within this range, a message is output in the Write Window.

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: Integer for the lower interval limit.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Integer for the upper interval limit.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
